creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 190793
Update to 3.2.10 (with suggested changes by sunpoet@)


I've taken your suggestions and incorporated them into the Makefile, with one exception. Instead of removing the two files in post-extract, I've added find parameters to the COPYSHARE_TREE command to accomplish the same. (As shown in section 5.16.3 of https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/install.html)

Thanks for your tips. Hopefully this remedies all the issues to your satisfaction.
